errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailNotifications.description: Receive important updates and notifications via email
settings.pushNotifications.description: Get instant notifications in your browser
settings.twoFactorAuth.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.loginAlerts.description: Get notified when someone logs into your account

domains.title: Organization Domains
domains.description: Manage the domains associated with your organization. Users with email addresses at these domains can join automatically.
domains.noDomains: No domains have been added yet.
domains.domainDescription: Enter the domain you want to allow (e.g. example.com)
domains.autoJoinDescription: Allow users with this domain to join automatically.
domains.enforceSSODescription: Require single sign-on for users with this domain.
domains.verificationDescription: Verify your domain to enable secure access.
domains.verificationInstructions: Add a DNS record to verify your domain. See documentation for details.
domains.addError: Failed to add domain. Please try again.
domains.fetchError: Failed to fetch domains. Please try again.
domains.removeError: Failed to remove domain. Please try again.
domains.verifyError: Failed to verify domain. Please try again.
domains.updateError: Failed to update domain settings. Please try again.

sso.samlConfigDescription: Configure your SAML identity provider settings.
sso.oidcConfigDescription: Configure your OIDC identity provider settings.

saml.entityIdDescription: The unique identifier for your SAML provider.
saml.signInUrlDescription: The SAML SSO endpoint for sign-in.
saml.signOutUrlDescription: The SAML SLO endpoint for sign-out (optional).
saml.certificateDescription: The public X.509 certificate used to verify SAML assertions.
saml.emailMappingDescription: The SAML attribute that contains the user's email address.
saml.nameMappingDescription: The SAML attribute that contains the user's name (optional).
saml.roleMappingDescription: The SAML attribute that contains the user's role (optional).

oidc.scopesDescription: The scopes to request from the OIDC provider.
oidc.emailMappingDescription: The OIDC claim that contains the user's email address.
oidc.nameMappingDescription: The OIDC claim that contains the user's name (optional).
oidc.roleMappingDescription: The OIDC claim that contains the user's role (optional).

sso.saveConfigError: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
sso.fetchConfigError: Failed to load configuration. Please try again.
sso.spMetadataDescription: Details about your application's SAML service provider.
sso.samlConfigFooter: Need help? See the SAML documentation for setup instructions.
sso.oidcConfigFooter: Need help? See the OIDC documentation for setup instructions.
